title: ARMODAFINIL
description: Armodafinil is the R-enantiomer of modafinil, offering longer-lasting wakefulness promotion with potentially smoother effects. It's FDA-approved for narcolepsy, shift work sleep disorder, and obstructive sleep apnea.

research.title: Armodafinil as a Potential Pharmacological Treatment for Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder in Adults: A Review
research.summary: Armodafinil demonstrates potential as a treatment for adult ADHD, improving wakefulness, memory, impulse control, and executive functions.

research.title: Adjunctive armodafinil for major depressive episodes associated with bipolar I disorder
research.summary: At 150 mg/day, adjunctive armodafinil improved depressive symptoms in bipolar depression patients, though not all measures showed improvement.

research.title: Adjunct armodafinil improves wakefulness and memory in obstructive sleep apnea/hypopnea syndrome
research.summary: Armodafinil enhanced wakefulness, memory, and reduced fatigue in obstructive sleep apnea patients while maintaining regular nCPAP use.

research.title: Armodafinil as adjunctive therapy in adults with cognitive deficits associated with schizophrenia
research.summary: At 200 mg/day, armodafinil showed no cognitive improvement but appeared to mitigate negative schizophrenia symptoms.

research.title: Armodafinil for treatment of excessive sleepiness associated with shift work disorder
research.summary: Armodafinil significantly improved wakefulness during night shifts and overall clinical condition without affecting daytime sleep.

research.title: Efficacy of Treatment With Armodafinil for Cancer-Related Fatigue in Patients With High-grade Glioma
research.summary: Armodafinil showed no significant reduction in cancer-related fatigue in high-grade glioma patients, but may benefit corticosteroid users.

research.title: A phase 3, double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled study of armodafinil for excessive sleepiness associated with jet lag disorder
research.summary: At 150 mg/day, armodafinil significantly increased wakefulness and reduced sleep latency following eastward travel across 6 time zones.

sentiment.summary: Users generally prefer armodafinil over modafinil for its smoother, longer-lasting effects. Many report cleaner focus without the edginess some experience with modafinil.

effects.label: Genetic Variation:
effects.description: Effectiveness may vary based on CYP450 enzyme genetics.

dosage.label: Early Dosing:
dosage.description: Take early to avoid sleep disruption.

sideEffects.label: Insomnia:
sideEffects.description: Can disrupt sleep if taken too late.

availability.label: Prescription Required:
availability.description: Schedule IV controlled substance in the US.

availability.label: Brand Names:
availability.description: Sold as Nuvigil in the US.
